page.title: WebShopX Control Panel
page.loginDesc: Sign in with an admin account to access the control panel.
page.loginSecurityDesc: Do not expose admin credentials in public environments.
page.currentAdminDesc: Displays current session role and permissions.
page.currentAdminTipDesc: Different admin roles can access different modules.
page.materialCropDesc: Drag to move, use wheel/slider to zoom, and pinch on mobile. Then click Apply and Upload.
page.productCustomItemModeHint: Allow non-vanilla item keys (for example namespace:item) and process by command template.
page.updateCardDesc: New version {latestVersion} is available. You can view details or download the JAR directly.
page.productScheduleHint: Publish/unpublish times are interpreted in timezone {timeZone}.
page.loginMissingCredentials: Please enter admin account and password.
page.rechargePaymentDesc: Set the payment currencies, methods, and ShopCoin credit rates players can use for recharge.
page.rechargePaymentRatesHint: One line per rule: method,currency,ShopCoin credited per 1 payment unit. Example: ALIPAY,CNY,100 means 1 CNY = 100 ShopCoin.
page.rechargePaymentAllowedDialogDesc: These methods and currencies come from the current payment backend capabilities.
page.rechargePaymentAllowedEmpty: The current payment backend did not return available methods or currencies.
page.rechargePaymentCurrencyRequired: Enter at least one valid payment currency.
page.rechargePaymentMethodRequired: Select at least one payment method.
page.rechargePaymentRateRequired: Enter at least one ShopCoin rate rule.
page.rechargePaymentRateInvalid: Rate rule on line {line} is invalid.
page.localeSectionDescHtml:
Manage installed locale packages with upload and online fetch. Only installed locales can be used.
Upload template: Wiki.
If your target locale is missing online, request it on Crowdin.
page.localeCenterStatusNeedLogin: Waiting for admin sign-in before syncing locale center.
page.localeManifestDesc: Fetch locale list first, then select packages to download.
page.localeManifestPromptFetchFirst: Click Fetch first to load locale list.
page.localeStateWebPending: {locale} Web state staged. Click Apply to save.
page.localeStateGamePending: {locale} in-game state staged. Click Apply to save.
page.localeStateRemovePending: {locale} removal staged. Click Apply to save.
page.localeStateDefaultPending: Default locale staged as {locale}. Click Apply to save.
page.localeStatePickUploadFile: Please choose a locale package file first.
page.localeStateRequireLogin: Please sign in as admin first.
page.localeManifestEmptyList: No selectable locale yet. Click Fetch first.
page.localeManifestNeedSelect: Please select at least one locale.
page.themeSectionDescHtml: Manage installed theme packages with upload and online fetch. Users can switch between enabled themes.
page.themeCenterStatusNeedLogin: Waiting for admin sign-in before syncing theme center.
page.themeManifestDesc: Fetch theme list first, then select packages to download.
page.manifestSourceDialogDesc: Choose whether to enable GitHub acceleration and set a preferred proxy node.
page.manifestSourceDialogHint: These settings apply to both "Fetch list" and "Download selected".
page.manifestSourceDialogHintOff: GitHub acceleration is disabled. Requests use the manifest URL directly.
page.manifestSourceProbeNeedLogin: Please sign in as admin first.
page.manifestSourceProbeFailed: All proxy checks failed. Keep current settings.
page.themeManifestPromptFetchFirst: Click Fetch first to load theme list.
page.themeStateWebPending: {themeId} Web state staged. Click Apply to save.
page.themeStateRemovePending: {themeId} removal staged. Click Apply to save.
page.themeStateDefaultPending: Default theme staged as {themeId}. Click Apply to save.
page.themeStatePickUploadFile: Please choose a theme package file first.
page.themeStateRequireLogin: Please sign in as admin first.
page.themeManifestEmptyList: No selectable theme yet. Click Fetch first.
page.themeManifestNeedSelect: Please select at least one theme.

autoHtml.k0006: Maximum number of uses per account
autoHtml.k0015: Redemption codes are single-use by default. If multiple uses are enabled, please pay attention to the validity period and the recipients.
autoHtml.k0033: The time for listing and delisting products is handled according to the configured time zone.
autoHtml.k0059: Advanced parameters (view documentation | modify with caution)
autoHtml.k0060: Leaving it blank will automatically revert to the default value.
autoHtml.k0061: Algorithm parameters JSON (optional, compatible with manual override)
autoHtml.k0063: Usually, it can be configured through the visual editor above; when manually filling in JSON, please use object format.
autoHtml.k0064: Only items for sale/repurchase support dynamic pricing; for specific rules and algorithms, refer to the help documentation
autoHtml.k0081: Used for frontend icon display, does not affect actual delivery
autoHtml.k0083: Used for front-end name display, does not affect actual delivery
autoHtml.k0084: Custom icon (priority higher than display material)
autoHtml.k0090: You can upload an individual product icon after saving the product first.
autoHtml.k0096: You can fill in the purpose description, precautions, group purchase redemption instructions, etc.
autoHtml.k0130: View recent orders and their status.
autoHtml.k0160: Configure the exchange direction and ratio between web coins and game coins .
autoHtml.k0163: web currency -> game currency switch
autoHtml.k0168: web currency -> game currency ratio
autoHtml.k0171: Game Coins -> Web Coins Switch
autoHtml.k0176: game coins -> web coins ratio
autoHtml.k0182: The buyer pays the tax rate, and the seller deducts the handling fee.
autoHtml.k0188: Treasury user ID (required in TREASURY mode)
autoHtml.k0192: Unified setting for player-side and management-side display names/abbreviations.
autoHtml.k0204: game currency and its connection status with the Vault economy system.
autoHtml.k0208: Determined by `config.yml`. SQLite only supports a single server (cluster.role=standalone).
autoHtml.k0215: Control the player-side leaderboard page switch, online status display, and default sorting.
autoHtml.k0230: Control session, time zone, shipping and refund policies, suitable for unified distribution across multiple servers.
autoHtml.k0249: Control the maximum listing limit on the market and the automatic replenishment strategy for supply.
autoHtml.k0259: Control the frequency of cleaning and the retention time of data such as bindings and redemption codes.
autoHtml.k0277: You can directly edit the JSON here, and click 'Apply' to sync it to the form above.
autoHtml.k0285: Fields marked with * indicate that multiple values can be entered separated by commas. If you do not understand a certain parameter, please refer to the relevant documentation.
autoHtml.k0307: You can directly edit the JSON here, and click 'Apply to Visualization' to sync it to the form above.
autoHtml.k0311: Unified control of file log output levels and retention policies across multiple servers.
autoHtml.k0324: Unified control of market broadcast switches and cross-server message templates.
autoHtml.k0335: Visual editing of announcement messages, business notification switches, and notification templates.
autoHtml.k0345: Enter the announcement content to be pushed to all users
autoHtml.k0352: Controls the permissions for customizing global product icons and titles.
autoHtml.k0371: Official products are allowed to upload images
autoHtml.k0374: The player market allows custom icons
autoHtml.k0377: The player market allows custom names
autoHtml.k0380: The player market allows uploading pictures
autoHtml.k0386: Priority: Custom -> Reference Table -> Original Material -> Default Placeholder.
autoHtml.k0393: Leave blank to follow the default translation
autoHtml.k0415: Material name in English or Chinese
autoHtml.k0424: Enter a nickname or UUID to search for an account.
autoHtml.k0426: For example, player name or UUID
autoHtml.k0430: Perform support operations on the queried account.
autoHtml.k0459: Waiting to read the listing quantity limit
autoHtml.k0462: Supports filtering by keywords and can be directly loaded into the workspace for editing.
autoHtml.k0466: Hide disabled, unlinked, or useless cards
autoHtml.k0469: The super administrator can create sub-administrators and assign permissions precisely.
autoHtml.k0476: First choose a template, then adjust the permissions as needed.
autoHtml.k0483: Supports loading edits, enabling, and disabling administrators.
autoHtml.k0485: Waiting to load the administrator list
autoHtml.k0490: After making modifications, first click 'Save Template', then click 'Save Message Settings' to write to the database.
autoHtml.k0499: Template Available for Collection in the Market
autoHtml.k0504: After making modifications, click 'Save' to apply to the list; you need to click 'Save Tag Rules' at the end for it to be written into the database.
autoHtml.k0520: Required: Rule ID, action type. All other fields are optional.
autoHtml.k0521: After modification, click 'Save' to apply to the list; you must click 'Save listing restrictions' at the end for it to be written into the database.

uiText.localeSectionDescHtml:
Manage installed locale packages with upload and online fetch. Only installed locales can be used.
Upload template: Wiki.
If your target locale is missing online, request it on Crowdin.
uiText.themeSectionDescHtml: Manage installed theme packages with upload and online fetch. Users can switch between enabled themes.
uiText.localeStatePickUploadFile: Please choose a locale package file first.
uiText.localeManifestPromptFetchFirst: Click Fetch first to load locale list.
uiText.manifestSourceDialogDesc: Choose whether to enable GitHub acceleration and set a preferred proxy node.
uiText.themeStatePickUploadFile: Please choose a theme package file first.
uiText.themeManifestPromptFetchFirst: Click Fetch first to load theme list.
uiText.unsavedChangesConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave this page?
uiText.materialIdRequiredBeforeUpload: Please enter the Material ID first, then select an icon to upload.
uiText.localeFetchOnlineFailed: Failed to fetch online language list
uiText.localeImportOnlineFailed: Failed to import online language package
uiText.themeFetchOnlineFailed: Failed to fetch online theme list
uiText.themeImportOnlineFailed: Failed to import online theme package

defaultNotificationTemplates.market_listed: Your listing #{listingId} has been published: {item} x{quantity}, unit price {priceText}.
defaultNotificationTemplates.market_trade: Listed #{listingId} Sold out: {item} x{quantity}, Total Price {totalText}.
defaultNotificationTemplates.auction_bid_seller: Auction {listingText} has received a new bid from {bidderName}.
defaultNotificationTemplates.auction_outbid: Your leading bid on auction {listingText} has been outbid.
defaultNotificationTemplates.market_buy_escrow_refund: The escrow amount for Purchase Order {listingText} has been refunded: {amountText}.
defaultNotificationTemplates.delivery_wait_claim_order: Order {token} automatic delivery failed. Please execute /ws claim {token} in the game to claim it. Reason: {reason}
defaultNotificationTemplates.delivery_wait_claim_market: Automatic delivery of market items failed, please execute /ws claim {token} in the game to receive them. Reason: {reason}
defaultNotificationTemplates.mailbox_pending: Inventory was unavailable during auto delivery, item moved to mailbox. Run /ws mailbox claim in-game. Source: {sourceType} {sourceDetail}
